Operation 'get_object_object_id' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description 'Nothing special to note' provides no actionable information for AI agents. The summary is acceptable but the description lacks clarity about what data is returned, what the object_id parameter represents, and the operation's purpose. Enhanced description explains the return value, clarifies the input parameter context, and provides guidance on when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific object in the collection by its unique identifier. Returns the complete Object schema containing all available metadata including properties, relationships, and associated data. Use this operation to fetch full object details for display or further processing.

message: Operation 'get_search_term' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_input_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Both summary and description are identical and overly generic, providing no guidance for AI agents on what the search term accepts, how matching works, or what results are returned. The improved summary adds specificity about searching 'collection objects'. The enhanced description clarifies what the term parameter accepts, explains the search behavior (partial matching, case-insensitivity), specifies the return type, and indicates result ordering to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation effectively.

data.description_suggestion: Searches the collection for objects matching the provided search term. The term parameter accepts text queries to find objects by title, description, artist, or other indexed fields. Returns a collection of matching Object results ordered by relevance. Supports partial text matching and is case-insensitive.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description are identical and overly generic, providing no guidance for AI agents on what the search term accepts, how matching works, or what results are returned. The improved summary adds specificity about searching 'collection objects'. The enhanced description clarifies what the term parameter accepts, explains the search behavior (partial matching, case-insensitivity), specifies the return type, and indicates result ordering to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation effectively.
